content.problemStatement:
Write a C program to find factorial of a number using recursion.


Input Format
The only line of input contains a single integer NNN.



Output Format
Print the factorial of the given number.
content.inputFormat: The only line of input contains a single integer N.
content.outputFormat: Print the factorial of the given number.

solution.approach: The problem can be solved using recursion. The factorial of a number N is the product of all positive integers less than or equal to N. We can use a recursive function to calculate the factorial. The base case is when N is 0 or 1, in which case the factorial is 1. For N greater than 1, we can call the recursive function with N-1 and multiply the result by N.
solution.spaceComplexity: O(N) due to the recursive call stack.
